languages.text: {n}Техножрица несколько секунд сверлит вас взглядом, а затем выкрикивает:{/n} "Протокол 21.190! Ты в своем праве, Вольный Торговец. Я передам эти данные на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".
{n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрица несколько секунд сверлит вас взглядом, а затем выкрикивает:{/n} "Протокол 21.190! Ты в своем праве, Вольный Торговец. Я передам эти данные на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
{n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
{n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストがあなたを数秒間睨みつけ、それから叫ぶ:{/n}「プロトコル21.190！それはあなたの権利だ、ローグトレーダー。このデータをアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に送信する」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}テクプリストがあなたを数秒間睨みつけ、それから叫ぶ:{/n}「プロトコル21.190！それはあなたの権利です、ローグトレーダー。このデータをアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に送信します。」

languages.text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa te fulmina con la mirada, y después exclama:{/n} «¡Protocolo 21.190! Está en su derecho de hacerlo, Comerciante Independiente. Transmitiré la información a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa te fulmina con la mirada, y después exclama:{/n} «¡Protocolo 21.190! Está en su derecho de hacerlo, Comerciante Independiente. Transmitiré la información a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».

languages.text: {n}技术神甫怒视你几秒，随后吼道：{/n}“21.190协议！您有权这样做，行商浪人。我会将此数据传输至卡利西斯祭坛17号。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫怒视你几秒，随后吼道：{/n}“21.190协议！您有权这样做，行商浪人。我会将此数据传输至卡利西斯祭坛17号。”

languages.text: {n}Die Techpriesterin sieht dich finster an und brüllt schließlich:{/n} "Protokoll 21.190! Das ist Euer gutes Recht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde diese Daten nach Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 senden."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Techpriesterin sieht dich finster an und brüllt schließlich:{/n} "Protokoll 21.190! Das ist Euer gutes Recht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde diese Daten nach Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 senden."

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, birkaç saniyeliğine sana öfkeyle bakıp sonra bağırıyor.{/n} "Protokol 21.190! Bunu yapmak hakkınızdır Hür Tacir. Bu veriyi Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye ileteceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, birkaç saniyeliğine sana öfkeyle bakıp sonra bağırıyor.{/n} "Protokol 21.190! Bunu yapmak hakkınızdır Hür Tacir. Bu veriyi Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye ileteceğim."

languages.text: {n}La technoprêtresse vous dévisage quelques secondes avant de crier :{/n} « Protocole 21.190 ! Vous en avez parfaitement le droit, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je vais transmettre ces données à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: {n}La technoprêtresse vous dévisage quelques secondes avant de crier :{/n} « Protocole 21.190 ! Vous en avez parfaitement le droit, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je vais transmettre ces données à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »
